patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 7 near-zero threshold firings (+0.0009 MIN@CHW, +0.0028 CHC@PIT) are rule-correct but extremely conservative; both pre-cap picks were A-grade — revisit minimum gap threshold after 30 live captures.
Large f5_full_delta (>=0.12) with negative hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap is bullpen-carry conviction signal, NOT a DOWNGRADE trigger — validated by 5/26 NYY@KC 15-1 blowout.
Market pricing 13+pp against model pick on bottom-bucket games warrants DOWNGRADE over CONFIRM; CONFIRM-rescued (0.50,0.55] band hits only 47.6% (below 50% breakeven).
D-grade dual-signal-against pattern degraded to ~55% cumulative reliability after 5/25 0-for-4 outlier; treat as weak directional signal only, not certainty-of-loss.

LAA @ DET.reasoning: Pre-cap grade was already D (-1) before any hard caps fired — dual opposing signals: Grayson Rodriguez (LAA) holds a +0.60 xERA edge over Flaherty (DET), and PQI Δ=-7.8 directly against DET late-game. The model itself rated this a no-bet before any cap logic. Game is FINAL: LAA won 7-1, validating the D-grade analysis. No qualitative basis to override a pre-cap D with dual opposing signals.
lessons_applied: D-grade pre-cap requires no additional cap to suppress

MIN @ CHW.reasoning: Pre-cap A/8 with strong conviction (F1_xera_gap=3.01 Davis Martin, F3=4419.9). HARD CAP 7 fired at near-zero hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0009 (minimum threshold); Odds API failure also left fair_prob missing — market validation unavailable. Both caps fired correctly per rules. CHW is winning 6-2 live (directionally sound), but fair_prob absence alone warrants zero-stake. PLATINUM tier historical ~43% hit rate adds further skepticism.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 7 near-zero threshold fires per rules regardless of pre-cap conviction
fair_prob missing = market validation unavailable = no stake
PLATINUM tier ~43% historical hit rate warrants scrutiny

ATL @ BOS.reasoning: Pre-cap A- (score=4) with SP edge (+0.86 xERA BOS, Tolle over Sale) and PQI=+8.3. However, market prices ATL at 55.5% (fair_prob=0.4447 for BOS — a 13pp market gap against model). ATL's 37-19 record vs BOS's 23-31 reflects a genuine quality gap the model may underweight. CONFIRM-rescued picks in the (0.50, 0.55] band hit only 47.6% (below 50% breakeven). Declining to rescue HARD CAP 10; SKIP is the correct tier.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 10 bottom-bucket SKIP-unless-CONFIRM: declining to CONFIRM given market gap
market 13pp disagreement = do not override bottom-bucket cap
CONFIRM-rescued band hits 47.6% below breakeven — no rescue

TOR @ BAL.reasoning: Primary pick of today's slate: grade A (score=5), no caps fired. Bassitt (BAL) holds 0.54 xERA edge over Corbin (TOR). F3_swing_take_gap=4279.4 and PQI=+6.4 both confirm BAL. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0094 with f5_full_delta=0.1441 triggers bullpen-carry conviction pattern per 5/26 NYY@KC lesson (negative gap + large delta = CONFIRM, not DOWNGRADE). Risk: Springer is OWNER vs Bassitt (17 PA, 2 HR, shrunk 0.821), but top-3 BvP is mixed overall. bullpen_fatigue is a stake-size qualifier, not a direction flip.
lessons_applied: stress flags are stake reducers not direction predictors (5/25)
single OWNER batter insufficient to flip top-3 BvP analysis

CHC @ PIT.reasoning: Paul Skenes' F1_xera_gap=4.25 over Rea and PQI=+43.7 drove pre-cap A/5. HARD CAP 7 fired at marginal hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0028 (near-zero). Live CHC lineup includes Alex Bregman at cleanup (absent from empty CSV batter data) — this strengthens the late-inning bullpen pressure case for PIT, validating CAP 7 rather than arguing against it. Edge is thin (4.7pp). B- grade confirmed; Skenes verified as starter per MLB API.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 7 confirmed: Bregman in cleanup adds lineup quality validating bullpen pressure concern
thin edge (4.7pp) warrants no escalation beyond B-
Skenes confirmed starter — no PENDING_SP_DATA risk unlike 5/26

HOU @ TEX.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 (edge=-1.66pp < 0) and HARD CAP 10 (pick_prob=0.511 in bottom-bucket) correctly zero this pick. F1_xera_gap=1.03* carries thin-sample asterisk — unreliable xERA estimate. acute_roster + confidence_downgrade flag additional instability. HOU-TEX series produced 9-0 HOU win followed by 10-7 TEX win in consecutive prior days — highly volatile near-50% matchup confirmed as no-stake archetype.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 negative edge = zero stake
F1* thin-sample asterisk = unreliable sole signal
consecutive series volatility (9-0 then 10-7 reversal) validates bottom-bucket no-stake
